perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman lying back on a grey textured surface, wearing a green and white patterned bikini top. A digital filter of pink bunny ears and a bow is applied to her head, with small white dots on her cheeks. (2) She looks directly into the camera, smiling and talking while gesturing slightly with her head. A decorative question box with a mouse cursor icon appears over her chest area. (3) Throughout the video, she maintains eye contact, her facial expressions shifting between storytelling and laughing at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo lo-fi background music with a bouncy electronic melody starts immediately. (2) A young female voice begins speaking in a friendly, conversational tone, narrating a story in Mandarin Chinese. The music remains at a consistent volume behind the vocals. (3) The voice ends with a light, cheerful laugh as the music continues until the clip cuts off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '去台灣' (Going to Taiwan) - Hook text, neutral tone. (2) '被搭訕' (Being approached) - Hook text, slightly curious tone. (3) '來台灣有被搭訕嗎' (Were you approached when you came to Taiwan?) - Functional question box text. (4) '有一個 歪果仁' (There was a foreigner) - Narrative subtitle. (5) '可能他以為我是台灣女生吧' (Maybe he thought I was a Taiwanese girl) - Narrative subtitle. (6) '然後我跟他說我是馬來西亞人' (Then I told him I'm Malaysian) - Narrative subtitle. (7) '他有點驚訝' (He was a bit surprised) - Narrative subtitle. (8) '之後我們交換IG' (After that we exchanged IG) - Narrative subtitle. (9) '我給他我美食的帳號' (I gave him my food account) - Narrative subtitle. (10) '嘿嘿' (Hehe) - Decorative emotional text. (11) '我對你們多好' (See how good I am to you) - Playful narrative subtitle. (12) '哈哈' (Haha) - Decorative laughter text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Constant talking head video narrating a story with text overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator clearly visible in frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white and green leafy print bikini top and a pink bunny ear filter.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A grey textured fabric or headboard behind the subject.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft indoor lighting, possibly natural or ring light.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural with a slight beauty filter softening the skin.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a playful personal anecdote about a social encounter in Taiwan, highlighting the creator's Malaysian identity and her humorous way of handling being approached by giving out a food-themed Instagram account instead of her personal one.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of pink bunny ear filter and friendly, intimate address to her audience.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular vlog format where a creator answers a viewer's question while lying down in a relaxed setting.
